title: Memory & Credential Management
description: Agent stores/retrieves API keys via XOR-encrypted keychain; compresses and archives raw sessions; searches for relevant skills via remote API.

actors.label: Agent / User
actors.note: Claude agent or human operator invoking memory subsystem APIs

actors.label: Skill Search API
actors.note: Remote HTTP service at SKILL_SEARCH_API (default http://www.fudankw.cn:58787)

use_cases.name: Store API Key / Secret
use_cases.description: Saves a named secret (value or file content) to the XOR-encrypted keychain file ~/ga_keychain.enc
steps: Agent calls keys.set('name', 'value') or keys.set('name', file='/path')
If file= given, reads plaintext from path and strips whitespace
XOR-encrypts full JSON dict with SHA-256(username)-derived mask

use_cases.name: Retrieve Secret
use_cases.description: Returns a SecretStr wrapper for a stored secret; masks value in repr to prevent accidental logging
steps: Raises KeyError if key not found
Agent calls .use() to obtain the raw string value

use_cases.name: List Stored Keys
use_cases.description: Returns list of all key names currently in the keychain (no values exposed)

use_cases.name: Load Keychain from Disk
use_cases.description: Auto-loads keychain on import; decrypts ~/ga_keychain.enc; on corrupt file renames to .enc.bak and starts empty

use_cases.name: Compress Session File
use_cases.description: Strips system-prompt and assistant-echo from raw session logs; writes compressed MMDD_HHMM-MMDD_HHMM.txt archive
steps: Detects format: 'json' (kept as-is) or 'raw' (strip system prompt + ASSISTANT echo)
Extracts timestamps from === Prompt === markers; builds output filename
Writes compressed text to dst_dir; skips if result < 4500 bytes
Returns (dst_path, {src, dst, fmt, orig_kb, new_kb, ratio, year})

use_cases.name: Extract Conversation History
use_cases.description: Parses <history> blocks from session files; merges sliding-window [USER]/[Agent] turn lists into one deduplicated sequence

use_cases.name: Batch Archive Sessions
use_cases.description: Full pipeline: compress raw sessions → append histories → zip into monthly archives → delete raw files. dry_run=True (safe default) reports without writing.
phases: Phase 1: Compress each model_responses_*.txt (skip <2h old, skip duplicates)
Phase 3: Archive compressed .txt to YYYY-MM.zip per month

use_cases.name: Search for Skills
use_cases.description: Detects local environment, POSTs query + env context to Skill Search API, deserializes ranked SearchResult list
steps: Calls detect_environment() → {os, shell, runtimes, tools, model}
POSTs to /search with optional Bearer token from SKILL_SEARCH_KEY env var
Deserializes resp['results'] → list[SearchResult(skill=SkillIndex, relevance, quality, final_score, match_reasons, warnings)]

use_cases.name: Detect Environment
use_cases.description: Collects OS, shell, installed runtimes (python/node/go/rust/…) and tools (git/docker/kubectl/…) for skill compatibility filtering

use_cases.name: Get Skill Index Stats
use_cases.description: Queries /stats endpoint; returns total skill count, safe_count, category distribution

key_classes.name: SecretStr
key_classes.note: Prevents raw secret printing; masking depends on value length

key_classes.name: _Keys (singleton: keys)
key_classes.note: Module-level singleton; __getattr__ forwarded from module level

key_classes.name: SkillIndex
attrs: key, name, description, category, tags, language, os, runtimes, tools

key_relationships: compress_session reads FileSystem (raw session .txt) and writes FileSystem (compressed .txt)
batch_process orchestrates compress_session + extract_history + FileSystem (zip archives, all_histories.txt)
SkillSearchAPI returns JSON deserialized to SearchResult(SkillIndex)
search() uses SKILL_SEARCH_KEY (env var secret) for Bearer auth — logically links keychain to skill search
include_extend_notes: UC2 (Retrieve Secret) <<extend>> UC3 (List Keys) — agent lists first to discover key names
security_notes: Keychain uses XOR with SHA-256(username) mask — obfuscation, not strong encryption. SecretStr.__repr__ masks value to prevent log leaks. API key retrieved from env var SKILL_SEARCH_KEY (not from keychain directly in engine.py).
